name: Feature request
about: New feature or enhancement

**What do you want to build?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Who is it for?**
- [ ] Athlete
- [ ] Coach
- [ ] Admin

**Acceptance criteria**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

**File(s) to touch**
e.g. `client/src/pages/Recruiting.tsx`
